title: Working list
content:
---
  Critical Issues

  1. 495+ Console.WriteLine calls — Debug logging pollution throughout production code. Replace with ILogger
  or conditional diagnostics.
  2. Memory leak in GestureManager — _gestureState and _tapTracking dictionaries never cleaned up for removed
  views.
  3. Reflection-based gesture invocation — typeof(TapGestureRecognizer).GetMethod("SendTapped",
  BindingFlags.NonPublic) is fragile and will break across MAUI updates.
  4. No exception handling in rendering pipeline — A bad view implementation in SkiaRenderingEngine.Render()
  can crash the entire application.
  5. Version mismatch — .nuspec shows 1.0.0-preview.1 while .csproj shows 1.0.0-rc.1.
  6. Potential text binding recursion in EntryHandler.OnTextChanged — two-way sync without reentrancy guard.

  ---
  Medium Issues

  ┌───────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │         Issue         │                                   Location                                   │
  ├───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ Massive file sizes    │ SkiaEntry (57K lines), SkiaEditor (54K), SkiaLabel (41K) — should be split   │
  ├───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ Test coverage ~3%     │ Only 10 test files for 321 source files                                      │
  ├───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ Hard-coded thresholds │ SwipeMinDistance=50, SwipeMaxTime=500ms, region merge=30% — not configurable │
  ├───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ No feature detection  │ Assumes AT-SPI2, IBus available — crashes on minimal installs                │
  ├───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ .bak file in VCS      │ SkiaItemsView.cs.bak should be removed                                       │
  ├───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ Incomplete features   │ EntryHandler.MapReturnType() commented out, various TODOs                    │
  └───────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ---
  Priority Recommendations

  Before 1.0 release:
  1. Replace all Console.WriteLine with proper logging (ILogger or conditional #if DEBUG)
  2. Fix GestureManager memory leaks — add cleanup on view disconnect
  3. Add try-catch around view rendering in the engine
  4. Remove reflection in gesture handling — use interface or delegate pattern
  5. Align nuspec/csproj versions
  6. Add feature detection for optional services

  Near-term:
  1. Split files over 10K lines into partial classes or separate concerns
  2. Expand test coverage significantly (target 50%+)
  3. Extract duplicate text rendering code into shared utilities
  4. Make rendering thresholds configurable
